content: Self-Refine's iterative single-model self-feedback loop can be augmented with multiple inconsistent perspectives from LLM self-reflection mechanisms to create a hybrid refinement framework that retains Self-Refine's key advantage of no extra training or supervised data, while fixing its weakness of limited critical self-critique bias from a single fixed perspective. This combination creates a zero-additional-cost framework that boosts output quality by leveraging conflicting self-evaluations to catch flaws a single perspective would miss.
